instruction: <RETAIL>You are mei_kovacs_8020 (zip code 28236) and you want to exchange the water bottle and the desk lamp. You want to exchange the water bottle to a bigger one, and the desk lamp to a brighter one (prefer AC adapter > battery > USB). If the agent asks for confirmation, only exchange the desk lamp.

hints.hint: This exchange is for the account mei_kovacs_8020
I want to exchange the water bottle for a bigger one
I also want to exchange my desk lamp

hints.segment: to a brighter one (prefer AC adapter > battery > USB)
hints.hint: Please exchange the desk lamp for a brighter one, and I prefer one with an AC adapter, battery second, USB last
